testcase.name: test_03_global_60_per_min_on_markets

failure.message: AssertionError: missing keys: {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} assert ('error' in {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} and 'detail' in {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_task3_rate_limit_confirm.py:89: in test_03_global_60_per_min_on_markets _assert_clean_429(r) backend/tests/test_task3_rate_limit_confirm.py:33: in _assert_clean_429 assert "error" in body and "detail" in body, f"missing keys: {body}" E AssertionError: missing keys: {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} E assert ('error' in {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} and 'detail' in {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'})
